notes: Root composer.json requires the virtual interface psr/log-implementation. monolog/monolog 3.10.0 satisfies this via its own provide declaration (provide: {psr/log-implementation: 3.0.0}). Composer resolves only 2 real installable packages. psr/log-implementation MUST NOT appear as a package node; monolog/monolog and psr/log MUST appear.

packages.name: monolog/monolog
packages.source_detail: provides psr/log-implementation 3.0.0 (virtual interface satisfied by this package)

failure_modes_exercised: virtual package name appears as an unresolved dependency node
provider package not linked to virtual requirement
psr/log-implementation treated as a real installable package
virtual interface requirement causes scanner to report missing dependency
